headline: Valmont Industries' Stock Scale Fresh 52-Week High: Here's Why
summary: VMI hits a fresh 52-week high after Q1 profit jump 27.5%, and it lifts 2026 EPS guidance as Infrastructure expansion stays on track.

headline: ATI Prices $450 Million Senior Notes Offering Due in 2033
summary: ATI prices $450M of 5.875% senior notes due 2033, earmarking $350M to redeem its 2027 notes.

headline: CF Industries Holdings (CF) Gained From The Strait Of Hormuz Closure
summary: Cambiar SMID Fund, managed by Cambiar Investors, published its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The investor class (CAMMX) returned 2.21%, and the institutional class (CAMUX) returned 2.27%, underperforming the Russell 2500 Value Index’s 4.77%. This shortfall was mainly due to declines in certain healthcare and industrial […]

headline: Is CF Stock a Screaming Buy After a 50% Rally in 6 Months?
summary: CF has surged nearly 50% in six months as strong nitrogen demand and higher prices fuel earnings growth.
